hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Qiniqlugit ilauqatigiingnikkut tautuktitiyut, uuktuutit, uvalu ayungnaqtutigut qungiaqtitiyut hapkunanga hanayiit iligiit.

hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Qiniqhiayugut ihuaqtunik kiklighainik AImi, aatumatikkut, uvalu tuniuqhainikkut auladjutit, nuutiqhugit tutqighaqhimayut ihivriurutit ihuangnikkut havauhiit piyaangnirit.

researchAreas.title: Qauyiharnikkut Nayugait
researchAreas.description: Tamarmik ihumagilluaqtangit malruuknik qinirhiayuq ihivriuqniq iniqtirutinganut apqutingit piliurhimayuq piqpiaqtumut nunaryuaptikni timiqutigiyangit.

detailedFocusBriefs.title: Naunaijattiaqhimajut Ihumagijakhat Naittumik
detailedFocusBriefs.description: Qanitukkut-kikliqaqtut ihivriungnikkut pinahuarutit tadja nuutiqtut igluqpinikkut tutqighainirmun tunihinirmun upalungaiyautit.

fromLabToProduction.title: Ilituqhaivikmit Hanayauniganit
fromLabToProduction.description: Nutaanguqtiriniq Horizon-mi naunaiyaqtauvaktuq agyaqtauhimayunit qanurittaakhaanik, avaliittumik uuktuutigiyauyut.

roadmap.title: R&D Apqutikhaliuqhimayuq
roadmap.description: Ihuaqhaqhimayut pivalliadjutit piyaangnikkut-havaklugit hungiutinirmun, aulahimaaqtumik ihuaqhiyuumiqlugit auladjutit.

publications.title: Makpiraaliuqhimayut Ihumagiyauyullu
publications.description: Ayurnaqtunik titirarniq atulirnikhanut titiraqhimayut aullaranginaqtumik nutannguqtiutikhanut havaakhat.

appliedAi.title: Atuqtauyut AI Auladjutit
appliedAi.description: Piliurninnga-ihumagilluaqtait AI piliurninnga piyut uuktuutimut piyuq, pipkaidjutinga ihuarhainiq, unalu munariyauyuq uuktuutingit.

automationFrameworks.title: Qaritauyakkuugutiqhanut Havaaqhat
automationFrameworks.description: Iluani aatumatikkut hanalrutit auladjutinun qayangnautit, hulaqutinun kiudjutit, uvalu atuffaaqtaaqtut ingniqutiliqinikkut havauhiit.

advancedArchitecture.title: Hivutunirmik Napaqtirutikharnik Uuktuutikharnik
advancedArchitecture.description: Qaujiharniq mahulingaittunik, tuniuqhaqtauhimajunik nappaqtirutinik ihuarhaqtauhimajun havagutainnun, ihuirutikkut pidjutinun, aktikkulaanganullu.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing unalu IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Intelligence at the edge for low latency ihumaliurniq, alrujaqtuqtunik naunaijainiq, unalu hunavaluit aulapkaininnga.

nlp.title: Uqauhikkut Havauhiit
nlp.description: Amihunik uqauhilgit kangiqhimaniq naunaiyaininnganut, piiqtauniq, numiktirniq, uqaqatigiikniqmullu timiqutigiyangit.

evolutionaryAlgorithms.title: Evolutionary Algorithms & Optimization
evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Qiniqhianiq uvalu ihuaqhainikkut auladjutit pidjutiqaqtut nunamin tikuaqhinikkut ihuaqhaidjutighanik anginiqhaqmik ingniqutiliqinikkut ayuqhautinik.

automationFrameworks.title: Qaritauyakkuugutiqhanut Havaaqhat
automationFrameworks.description: Piliuliqtugut composable workflow frameworks release orchestration, quality gates, imaalu kinguagut-iliuraidjutaanut naunaiqhitikhat ikiglinahuarutikhanik makpiranut ihuirutauvaktunut ihuaqhijuuminahuaqhugit ihuarnikhanut.

advancedArchitecture.title: Hivutunirmik Napaqtirutikharnik Uuktuutikharnik
advancedArchitecture.description: Nappaktirinirmun uuktuutivut ihumagiplugit ikayuutikhanut ahiruqtiqpalliadjutikhanut qanuriliurutikhat, aallatqiinut avikturniinni mahulingaitkutikhanut atuqtakhat, havaktauyakhanullu atuqtakhanut aulayut aallanguqtaaqtunut piyumayauyunut.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing unalu IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Tutqighaliqtavut hulidjutinun-auladjutit uvalu kikliit inference idjuhiit tapkua pipkaiyut kayumitqiamik nunamingni ihumaliurutinik pihimablugu qitqani munaridjutit, ihivriurutit, uvalu atugahat hivituniitigut ataniudjutit.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.title: Hungiutinikkut Aktilaangitigut Upalungaiyautit
adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: Qaujiharvingmi prototypet naunaiqtauhimajut aadjikkiiktunik havaakhanik imaalu iliuraqtauplutik atuqtakhanut autoscaling qanuriliurutikhat.

operationalIntelligence.title: Aulapkainiqmut Ayuittiarniq
operationalIntelligence.description: NLP turhuangit nuutpaktut munariyauyunit uuktuutinit piliurninnganut ikayuutikhaq havaangit kayumitqiamik naunaiyaigiami naunaitqiamiklu tautuktuuyaaqtamiknik.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.title: Ihuarhainiq Tuniqhaininnganut Timiqutigiyangillu
optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: Aadlangurninnga qanuriliurutingit uuktuqtauyut naunaiyaivikmi numiktiqtauyut ihuarhaininnganut ihuarhaininnganut tuniqhaininngalu.

edgeDecisioning.title: Edge Ihumaliurniq
edgeDecisioning.description: IoT unalu edge inference uuktuutit hakugikhiyuumiqtut mikiyumik-latency kivgaqtuutit akhut ihuangnikkut kikliqaqhutik.

now.title: Atuqtauyut AI Tungaviit
now.description: Angikliyuumiqlugu atuffaaqtaaqtut uuktuutit-kivgaqtuqtut uuktuutit, naunaiyainikkut katitiqhimayut, uvalu qungiangnikkut atugahat tamaini tamayani havaqatigiit.

next.title: Inmikkut Ingniqutiliqinikkut Havauhiit
next.description: Aulapkailiqlugit qaritauyakkuugutiqhat ikiqliyuummiklugit atuqtittiyaami qayarnaktunik naittumiklu tuhaqtittiyaami agyaqtauyaami.

twelveToEighteenMonths.title: Edge-Native Intelligence
twelveToEighteenMonths.description: Aktikkulaanga hybrid-cloud-edge architectures qanituani piqpiaqtumik inference latency-qayaknaqtut avatingit.

longHorizon.title: Aulahimaaqtumik Ihuaqhainikkut Auladjutit
longHorizon.description: Atauttimungaqtirlugit uuktuutit, munariniq, ihuarhainiqlu taimaa timiqutigiyangit hungiutigiami qayangnaittumik avatingit aadlangurumi.

aiReliability.title: Havaklugit AI Auladjutit tapkua ihuaqtut havaktauyut
aiReliability.summary: Ihuaqtut ihumagiyauyut aadjikiingnirmun uuktuutit kayumiktilaangit havaktauyullu ataniudjutit.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.title: Tuniuqhaktauhimayut Nappaktirinirmun Uuktuutit Anggiyuamik Amigaikyuummiktut Tunngaviit
distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: Maniqami titiraqhimayut igluqpinikkut uuktuutini turaaqhimayut havauhiitigut, mahulingainikkut, uvalu auladjutikkut ayungnaitumik.

roadmappingAppliedRd.title: Apqutikhaliurniq Iliuraqhimayuq R&D Havakvikmi Qanurittaakhaanik
roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: Qanuqtut ihuaqhaqtavut nutaanguqtiriniq havauhikhat taimaa nalvaaqhiyut nuugiamikni uuktuutigiyauyumit naunaiyaqtaaqtuq akinganik.

cta.title: Havaklugit haffumuuna Horizon Innovation Lab
cta.description: Havaqatigiluta tutqighaqlugit ihumagiyauyut qilamik uvalu nuutiqlugit itquumayut ihumagiyauyut qayangnaitumik, aktilaaqtaaqtut havauhiit auladjutait.

hero.title: Atuqtauyut AI Auladjutit
hero.description: Ihuaqtut kangiqhidjutit qanuq Horizon idjuhiit, atuliqtitugit, uvalu auladjutait machine learning auladjutit prototypenin havaktauyunun.

machineLearningPipelines.title: Machine Learning Pipelines
machineLearningPipelines.description: Piliurninnga AI pilihaaliqtuq piliuffaaqtaaqtunik turhuanik atayuq nampanik, uuktuutinik, naunaiyainiq, kiudjutiniklu.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: Uuktuutinga Iliuraininnga Uuktuutingit
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: Iliuraininnga maliganga tikkuaqtauyuq piyuq latency ihariagiyanginnik, havakvikmi akhuurutauyuq, aulapkaininngalu ayurnarninnga.

mlopsOperatingModel.title: MLOps Aulapkaiyuq Uuktuutinga
mlopsOperatingModel.description: MLOps atuqhimaaqtangit naunaiyainiaqtun AI hanaqidjutikhangit aulayaangat atuguminaqtunik, kavamaliqidjutiqaqtunik, atuguminaqtuniklu atuqtauhimaaqtunik angikliyumiligumik.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Munariniq Nakuuninngalu
monitoringAndReliability.description: Qun'ngiarniq umiktiqtaa atuqtauyuq ukunanit uuktuutip pitquhinga aulapkaininngalu qanurittaakhaanik.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Nampanik Hunavalungniklu Piliurninnga
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Versioned nampangit iliurainiq, qanurittaakhaanik naunaiyainiq, unalu atuffaanginnarialik qanurittaakhaanik piliuqtuq nakuuyumik tunngavinga uuktuutimut ayuirhainiq.

modelDevelopment.title: Uuktuutimut Pivallianiq
modelDevelopment.description: Uuktuutit naunaiyaqtauyut piliuffaaqtaaqtunik ihuaqhaidjutinik, tikinnahuarutingit uuktuutingit, inmikkuuqtumiklu naunaiyainiq tunngavinga.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Tutqighainikkut uvalu Qayangnautikkut Ukkuangit
validationAndSafetyGates.description: Uuktuqtut atugahat qangiutiyut havauhiinun, hakugingnikkut, maliruagahanunlu ihivriurutit angiqtautinagit tuhaqtidjutinun.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Aulapkaiyuq Qanuqtut Kiudjutikhaq Iliuraqtauyuq
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: Kinguagut-aullaqtirninganit alrujaqtuqtunik naunaijaidjutit naunaiqhitivaktut ajuiqhaffaarutikhanik hivulliutijakhanik, utiqtiffaarlugit ihumaliurutikhat, imaalu tuklianik atuqtakhanik upalungaijautikhaliurnirmik.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Talvainnakmi Inference Services
realTimeInferenceServices.description: Mikiyumik-latency APIs ilauqatigiingnikkut atuqtakhat autoscaling, cache , unalu request-level qun'ngiarniq.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Batch unalu Streaming Itqurnarutingit
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Ihuaqhaqhimayut hulipkaidjutikhanullu turhuangit amigaitpiaktunik naunaiyaidjutikhanut naunaiyaidjutikhanut aulapkaidjutikhanullu havaktauyakhanut.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Edge-Aware Déploiement
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Hybrid-cloud-edge kivgaqtuidjutikhat atuqtakhat avatingnut pijariaqaqtut nunamingni inference imaalu qitqani atuqtakhat ataniqtuqtuidjutikhat.

ciCdForModels.title: CI/CD Uuktuutinut
ciCdForModels.description: Inmikkut piliurniq, uukturniq, tuniqhaininngalu havaangit ikikliyuumiutiyuq iliuraininnga qayangnautinga pihimaplugulu tuniqhaininnga kayumiktumik.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Qanurittumik Atiliurniq Aturninngalu
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Versioned model artifacts with promotion stages, lineage, and approval workflows ihuaqhivaalirutauyut munaritjutainut naunaipkutauyumiklu.

servingInfrastructure.title: Kivgaqtuqtut Aulapkaidjutikhanik
servingInfrastructure.description: Aktilaaqtaaqtuq kivgaqtungnikkut aktilaangit atulingnikkut hanaqidjutit imaatun canary uvalu shadow iliurainiq ikayuutauyuq qayangnaitumik aalanguqtirnirmun munaridjutit.

monitoringPillars.latencyThroughputAndCostEfficiencyTracki: Latency, throughput, unalu akinganik ihuarninnga naunaiyainiq
monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Nampangit qanurittaakhaanik mamianaaqtumik naunaipkainiq ihuarhaininngalu havaangit

cta.title: Aktikkulaanga Iliuraqhimayuq AI qanurunaaqhimaittumik
cta.description: Upalungaiyaiguvin AI pinahuagutinik tapkua ihagiahuktut aktilaagutiqaqtunik qanuginiinik uvalu hivituyumik ihuaqhaidjutait, Horizon ikayuqtaaqtuq idjuhikhaanik uvalu aulapkaqlugu tamaat auladjutit auladjutait.

hero.title: Amihunut-Uqauhiit NLP
hero.description: Qinirhialuni ihuaqtunik uqauhikkut havagutinik pittaarnirnik qanuqtullu aktilaanginni nakuujunun, amigaittunun uqauhiqaqtunun piliuqnikkut pidjutinun.

foundations.title: NLP Tunngavikhangit
foundations.description: Uqauhikkut havauhiit attautimukhimayut uqauhikkut naunaiyautit uvalu machine learning unguvaqtiqhugit kangiqhidjutait, pinahuarutait, uvalu havauhiit titiraqhimayunin.

workbench.title: Ilaulukaarniq NLPngit Havagviangit
workbench.description: Atuqlugu tautuktitiniq uukturiangani uqauhikkut naunaiyautit, mihingnautikkut kihiqtitautait, hunanik unguvaqtirutit, numiktirinirmunlu idjuhiit tadjainaq.

productionApplications.title: Qanuqtut Horizon Iliuraqtaa NLP Piliurninngani
productionApplications.description: NLP pittaarninnga ilaliutihimayuq havakvikmi havaangit havaangit havaamut hapummiutinga naunaittumiklu qanurittaakhaanik uuktuutingit.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Nakuuninnga unalu Piyunnautinga Maliktakhat
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: Piliurninnga NLP ihariagiyuq amigaitqiamik uuktuutimik qanurittaakhaanik; pidjutiqaqtuq qajangnaittumik aullaqtiutikhanut atuqtakhanik imaalu aullaranginnaqtumik naunaijautikhanik.

foundations.intro1: Nutaat NLP timiqutigiyangit hakugiktipkaiyuq ikayuqtuq ayurhautimik, qinirhianiq akhuurutauyuq, ilihimaniq piiqtauniq, amihuniklu uqauhilgit havaqatigiikniq. Nakuuyumik iniqtirutinga ihariagiyuq tamarmik uuktuutinga qanurittaakhaanik hakugiktumiklu aulapkaiyuq munariniq.
foundations.intro2: Horizon-mi, ihumagilluaqtavut nunguvinganit nunguvinganut NLP timiqutigiyangit ilaliutiyuq nakuuqpiaqtumik inference qun'ngiarniqmut, piyunnautinga, unalu naunaiyainiq piliurninnga pilaqutinga.

languageDetection.title: Uqauhirmik Naunaiyainiq
languageDetection.description: Ilitariyait uqauhinga naittumit takiyumikluuniit titiraqhimaninnga iliurariami apirhuutingit ihuaqtumut havaamut piyuq.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Mihingnautinun Naunaiyautit
sentimentAnalysis.description: Unguvaqtiqhugit ihumakkut pidjutit uvalu ihuangnirit akiliqtuiyut kangiqhimadjutait, ikayuutikkut ihuaqhaidjutit, uvalu hunat uqautigiyait.

entityExtraction.title: Hunavalungnik Piiqtauniq
entityExtraction.description: Ilituriblugit ihuaqhaqhimayut hunat atiit, nanminiqaqtut, nayugait, uvalu ubluit ihuaqhaqhimangitut titiraqhimayut.

translation.title: Numiktikhimayuq
translation.description: Ikayuqtuq amihunik uqauhilgit havaangit numiktiriyuq atuqtumit aulapkaiyuq titiraqhimaninnganikluuniit pihimahimmaaqtillugu qanurittaakhaanik.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Ikayuqtikhat Tikisinik Qauyimattiarniq
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Naunaiyaqlugit qaiyut apirhuutit qilamiurutikkut, pinahuaqtaitigut, mihingnautainullu qilamiurutigiyaangani auladjutait kiudjutillu qanuriniit.

governedContentOperations.title: Munariyauyut Iluaniitut Auladjutit
governedContentOperations.description: Atuqlugit maliruagahanun-ilihimanikkut uqauhikkut halumaqhidjutinik uvalu ihuaqhainikkut naunaiyautinik aktilaaqaqtunik ihuaqpiaqtumik uvalu itqaumalugit turaarutait.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Titiraqhimayut-Pihimayut Nanminikkut Kangiqhidjutit
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Katitirlugit qanuriliurutingit titiqqanit, ihivriurutit, uqaqatigiikniqlu naunaipkariami maliganga aulapkaininnganullu ihumaliurutingit.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Naunaiyainiq Aturninnga
evaluationByUseCase.description: Atugahat naunaiyaqtauhimayut hapkununga nayugainun-kitunun naunaiyautinun hivuani tuhaqtitinikkut ihumaliurutit havaktautinagit.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Inungmit Atuqtaunginnaqtuq Hapummiutingit
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: Akhuraaluk pilaqutinga itqurnarutinga ilaliutiyuq ihivriuqniq apqutingit, angikliyuumiqtuq maliktakhat, takunnaqtumiklu ilihimaniq naunaitkutat.

continuousMonitoring.title: Munarihimmaarniq
continuousMonitoring.description: Ahiruqtirniit, kinguvaqtirutit, nakuuniillu mikhivallianiit naunaijaqtauraanginnaqtun taimaatun ajuirhaffaarniq utiffaarnirlu ihuaqtun.

hero.title: Qanuritmangaangit Qaritauyaliqidjutingnik Auladjutikharnik
hero.description: Qiniqlugit aalanguqpalianikkut qaritauyaliqutit ilauqatigiingnikkut avatingni uvalu takulugit qanuq aadjikiit hivunikhaliurutit pidjutauyut havauhiinun ihuaqhiyuumingnikkut auladjutit.

scientificFoundation.title: Nalunaqtunik Naunaiyainiq Tunngavinga
scientificFoundation.description: Qanuritmangaangit naunairutingit amihuuninngit-piyuq ihuarhainiq qanuriliurutingit pipkaidjutiyuq uumannga nunamit tikkuarninnga hungiutiniqlu.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Ilaulukaarniq Auladjutikharnik Avatiliqinikkut
interactiveEnvironment.description: Aulatitilugu uuktuutikhaq tautugianganik iqaiyaliqinikkut ihuaryumirutikharnik ukiuqaqtunik qunngiagianganiklu qanuq pukuktauyukharnik ayungnautigivakhimayaingit naunairutingnik.

productionUse.title: Qanuq Horizon atuqpagait hamna piliuqhutik
productionUse.description: Aadjikiit qiniqhiadjutit atuqtauyut uvani tautuktitiyuni kangiqhidjutauyut ihuaqhainikkut tughuat aulapkaqtauyut auladjutinun auladjutinun.

applicationDomains.title: Hivitutqiaq Uuktuutingit
applicationDomains.description: Angikliyuumirninnga ihuarhainiq akhuurutaulluaqtuq timiqutigiyauyunut akhuurutauyumut tikinnahuarutingit ayurhautipkaiyullu kiklikhangit.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Qiniqhiangitkaluaqhuni attauhiqmik ihuaqhaidjutighamik, idjuhiitigut naunaiyautit pidjutiqaqtut aalakiinik inugiangnirnun uuktuqtunun. Attautit kinguliriit ihivriuqtauyut iqaiyangnikkut auladjutainun uvalu ihuaqhaqtaublutik tikuaqhinikkut, avatingnun, uvalu aalanguqataaqhutik.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Una nakuuqpiaqtuq quulitqiamut ayurhautingit aadjikutaringittumik kiklikhangit, talvani naunaiyaininnga qanuriliurutingit ahiruqtaaqtuq qaritauyakkulluuniit akituvallaaqtuq.

selection.title: Tikuaqhiniq
selection.description: Anginiqhakkut-havadjagiktut uuktuqtut annaumaniaqtut uvalu pidjutigilugit kingulikhavut.

crossover.title: Avatingnun
crossover.description: Hakugiktut idjuhiit attautimuktauffaaqtut piliugiangini nutaanik uuktuqtut ihuaqhaidjutighanik aalakiinik hakugingniinik.

mutation.title: Aalanguqtuq
mutation.description: Munariyauyuq quyaginaq pidjutiqaqtuq aalakiikniqmik taimaali qiniqhianiq nutqangittaangani nunamingni optima.

convergence.title: Atauttimungaqtirniq
convergence.description: Amihuni ukiuni, amihuuninngit piyut nakuuyumik, quulitqiamik ihuarhaidjutikhanik.

resourceScheduling.title: Ikayuutikhamut Naunaiyainiq
resourceScheduling.description: Atuqtavut angikliyuumirninnga maligangit ihuarhigiami amihunik-kikliqaqtuq ihuarhainiq talvani akhuurutauyuq qinirhianiq pilimaittuq.

architectureTuning.title: Nappaktirinirmun Ihuaqhainiq
architectureTuning.description: Uuktuqtut aulapkaitjutikhanik ihuarhaininngit ihivriuqtauyut ihuarhigiami havaangit akingalu ihuarninnga.

continuousOptimization.title: Aulahimaaqtumik Ihuaqhainiq
continuousOptimization.description: Ihuarhainiqmut havaat piyut munariyauyumik alruyaqtuqtumik naunaiyainiq kiudjutinga taimaa timiqutigiyangit hungiutigiami piumayanganik aadlanguraangat.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Apqutikhainut Auladjutikhanullu Upalungaiyautikhat
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Ayungnavyaktut tuyuqtaunikkut uvalu tuyungnikkut upalungaiyautit ikayuutauyut aalanguqpalianikkut qiniqhianirmun humi ayuqhautit aalanguqataaqtut qilamik.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Qanurittumik unalu Hyperparameter Qinirhianiq
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Qanuritmangaangit qiniqhiadjutikhangit nalvaaqhiniaqtun anginirmik atuqtakharnik atuqtakharnik taima hivunikhangit qaangit nipiquqtuyumik nallaumangitunlu.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Naunaitkutingit Tuniqhaininngalu Ayurhautingit
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Nakuuhivallianiq ataani akitaqutautiyut tikinnahuarutingit pittaaqtuq nakuuqpiaqtumik himmautinga tamainni aadlanguqtuq uuktuqtut piyut.
